name: antigravity-meta-plugin-kit
description: Author Antigravity plugins with guardrails: six meta skills and four specialist subagents that know the loader's traps.

defaultPrompt: meta-scaffold start a new Antigravity plugin
meta-agents add a subagent to my plugin
